purpose: Classify new rekordbox tracks by the user's set dramaturgy and local library taste, not just Beatport genre.

colors.Orange: Main Time / Indie Dance / club Breaks / Future House

taste_profile: Local database taste is the primary authority. Web genres and Beatport metadata are supporting evidence only.
Do not map rare colors broadly. Orange is experimental and should require strong local examples or manual review.
Progressive House is usually a journey lane. Prefer Purple for atmospheric/driving journey material; use Blue mostly for clearly deep/emotional warm material.
Melodic House & Techno is not automatically peak. Ben Böhmer-style melodic remixes and deep melodic material can be WARM/JOURNEY with Aqua/Blue/Purple rather than Red.
Breaks around 122 BPM often belongs to Aqua, rating 2, warm/open/journey. Do not make low-BPM breaks Orange MAIN by default.
Organic House can become Organic / Downtempo, Electronica, or Progressive depending on the track. Do not force all organic material to OPEN rating 1.
House and Tech House should stay House/Tech House unless there is strong evidence for a more specific club lane. Do not fall back to Dance / Pop just because iTunes says Pop.
Classic vocal club remixes may be Yellow or Red and tagged as Techno/House/Classic depending on energy; treat them as special cases for review.
Priority A/B/C is not stable yet. Do not require priority tags during learning batches.

library_calibration.reason: In this library Boris Brejcha / FCKNG SERIOUS sits with similar melodic techno tracks, not automatic red peak.
Ben Böhmer-style melodic remixes in this library lean deep/journey/warm, not automatic peak.

manual_examples.track: Chris Lake, The Chemical Brothers - Galvanize (Chris Lake Extended Mix)
manual_examples.lesson: Classic vocal club remix: user preferred rating 4, Yellow, Techno, MAIN TIME, Driving/Vocal/Emotional over Dance / Pop journey.
House on Crosstown Rebels should remain House; vocal/driving/deep, Yellow, rating 3, PEAK in user's current tagging.
Anjunadeep progressive can be much more energetic than WARM; user marked rating 4, Purple, PEAK, Atmospheric/Driving.

manual_examples.track: Marc Romboy, Stephan Bodzin - Callisto (Ben Böhmer Remix)
manual_examples.lesson: Melodic House & Techno is not automatic peak. User marked rating 2, Aqua, warm/deep/instrumental journey.
Indie Dance metadata can actually be Bass House/Techno/Melodic Techno energy; user marked Red, PEAK, Dark/Driving/Hypnotic, rating 3.
122 BPM Breaks should be Aqua/rating 2/open-warm, not Orange MAIN.
